# Human Residual Task-Space Diagnostic

All summaries are computed from existing frozen outputs; formal result files were not modified.

| bindingdb |           120 |          1779 |                  123.8    |                         140 |                   105.233  |                        119   |                25.6333 |                     16.5 |                  1.75 |                 39.25 |                           0.188  |                             0.1879 |
| biosnap   |           120 |           907 |                  175.533  |                         175 |                   149.133  |                        147.5 |                18.1167 |                     16   |                 10    |                 26.25 |                           0.1186 |                             0.0974 |
| human     |           120 |           311 |                   69.4333 |                          81 |                    59.0667 |                         68   |                 9.25   |                      9.5 |                  3.75 |                 13    |                           0.1328 |                             0.1391 |

## Human ratios
